title: jacquemontia secundiflora
intro: Jacquemontia secundiflora, also known as the Brazilian morning glory, is a flowering vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Jacquemontia secundiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, among others. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
